videos.title: New Career Best for Nawrath in Pokljuka
videos.description: Philipp Nawrath carried the form he showed in the BMW IBU World Cup at Ruhpolding to improve once again his career best in the men's 20 km individual at Pokljuka. He shot 20-for-20 to finish in 4th place.

videos.title: Pokljuka Men Individual Press Conference
videos.description: Johannes Thingnes Boe won the men's 20km individual at the BMW IBU World Cup in Pokljuka; his first competition after missing Ruhpolding and  Obehof, due to the birth of his son. In a competition where shooting clean was fundamental, he was perfect, finishing ahead of Martin Fourcade and Fabien Claude, who both also went 20-for-20. Claude's third place was his first-ever podium. The three then joined the official press conference.
